critical.mandate: Check for flaky test patterns — they are critical technical debt

step.title: Load Tests
step.action: Read test files for the target area

step.title: Quality Assessment
step.action: Check: determinism, isolation, naming, assertions, coverage

step.title: Flakiness Analysis
step.action: Identify potentially flaky tests: timing, state, network dependencies

step.title: Generate Report
step.action: Generate test review report with quality assessment and flakiness findings
